features: Superior Waterproof Protection: Designed to create a barrier against water, these plasters provide reliable protection even when exposed to moisture.
Strong Adhesion: Offers long-lasting adhesion to keep the plaster securely in place, ensuring continuous protection for wounds.
Flexible and Comfortable: Made from soft and flexible material that moves with your skin, ensuring comfort during wear.
Non-Stick Pad: Features a non-stick, highly absorbent pad that cushions wounds and prevents sticking, facilitating painless removal.
Hypoallergenic: Free from common allergens, making them suitable for individuals with sensitive skin or allergies.
description: Product Description Introducing Proplast Waterproof Plasters, your reliable solution for staying protected in wet conditions. These plasters create a strong barrier against water, ensuring your wounds remain shielded even when exposed to moisture. With their long-lasting adhesion, they stay securely in place, providing continuous protection. Made from soft and flexible material, they offer comfort and freedom of movement. Each plaster features a non-stick, absorbent pad to cushion wounds and facilitate pain-free removal. Plus, they're hypoallergenic, making them suitable for sensitive skin. Stay confidently protected with Proplast Waterproof Plasters, no matter the weather. Directions Clean the wound, apply the plaster, press down to secure, avoid getting wet.
